sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 152:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 152:1
items.html: They contain the records of the vessel of Bina of Partzuf AB, and they receive their illumination from the ZON of the vessel of Hochma. (Inner Light, Item‎ 47)
